root.name: Title Slide Background Color Change Task
root.description: Evaluates whether the agent successfully changed the title slide background color to light blue by creating a rectangular shape with transparency, overlaying it on the slide and sending it to the back

children.name: Title Slide Modified
children.description: Checks that the title slide (first slide) was actually modified

children.name: Shape Positioning and Size
children.description: Verifies that the rectangular shape covers the slide appropriately (overlay behavior)

children.name: Background Color is Light Blue
children.description: Uses visual analysis to verify the background color appears light blue

children.name: No Extraneous Changes
children.description: Ensures no unintended modifications were made to other slides or content

children.name: Other Slides Unchanged
children.description: Verifies that slides other than the title slide were not modified

children.name: Title Slide Content Preserved
children.description: Verifies that existing content on the title slide was not removed or significantly altered

metadata.task: Change the background color of the title slide to light blue by creating a rectangular shape with transparency, overlaying it on the slide and sending it to the back.
